ddls:
CREATE TABLE "asset_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset feature (e.g., ARCH_ALB, ARCH_Rep-1347) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset feature */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stocks, bonds, real estate) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the asset (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset feature was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary classification of the asset performance */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset feature being evaluated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the feature */,
  "absolute_held" REAL /* Absolute amount held for the feature */,
  "relative_held" REAL /* Relative holding percentage of the feature */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were calculated */,
  "benchmark_performance" REAL /* Performance of the asset against a benchmark */,
  "predicted_performance" REAL /* Predicted performance based on advanced analytics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_performance_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES asset_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset feature being held */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount held for the feature */,
  "absolute_held" REAL /* Absolute amount of the asset held */,
  "relative_held" REAL /* Relative percentage of the asset held against the total portfolio */,
  "holding_date" TEXT /* Date when the holding was recorded */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the holding belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the holding record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the holding record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_holdings_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES asset_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES asset_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
